positive: A whimsical, stylized geometric forest scene at twilight. The composition features stylized, interconnected trees and flora forming a central, symmetrical mandala pattern. The color palette is deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and shimmering gold accents, with clean, sharp edges defining all elements. The style should mimic modern Nordic abstract illustration mixed with Art Nouveau elegance, giving it a clean, graphic silhouette feel suitable for large-scale printing. Focus on negative space and high contrast for optimal apparel placement. The lighting is soft, ethereal, and moody, utilizing glowing bioluminescent elements within the foliage. Centered, symmetrical, highly detailed, maximalist yet organized.
